studies.title:
"MEMODIO_APP@CARE"
The first multi-domain app for people with mild cognitive impairment and mild dementia - a pilot study.
studies.brief_summary: The objective of the study is to test a newly developed digital intervention app, designed to improve cognitive abilities, daily activities, quality of life and activity in patients with Mild Cognitive Impairment and Mild Dementia. The app shall be used 5-7 times per week for around 20-30 min. The app will be tested against standard of care for these diagnoses.
